title: Altar SMP Texture Pack
description: Adds the Legendary weapons from Altar SMP
body:
This texture pack adds:
- Bone Blade
- Vulcan's Crossbow
- Bloodlust
- Frost Scythe
- Wand of Illusion
- Hyperion
- Nightpiercer
- Hyperion Shard
- Vampire Shard
- Crazy Slots
- Pure Blade
- Earth Gauntlet
- Withered Blade
- Shadow Blade
- Cutlass
- Paladin's Axe
- Windweaver
- Echo
- Eclipse
- Knightfall
- Pale


If you want to put the pack on your server use this plugin: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/resource-pack-manager.118574/
